Good to Know

Frequently Asked Questions

Call or WhatsApp us at +92 335 0533820 with your dates, the car you'd like, and your pickup location. We'll confirm availability and pricing right away.

Yes — our wedding fleet is decorated with flowers and ribbons as standard for wedding bookings. Let us know your colour preference when you book.

Most bookings come with a driver included, as reflected in our reviews. Self-drive may be available for certain vehicles — ask us when booking.

We're based in Rawalpindi and serve Rawalpindi, Islamabad and the surrounding twin-cities area, including airport pickup and drop-off.

For wedding dates, especially in peak wedding season, we recommend booking at least 2–3 weeks ahead to guarantee your preferred car.

Yes — Almadina Rent A Car is open 24 hours a day, every day, for bookings and pickups.
